senses.gloss: attractive, what tends to bring things closer
importer, who brings wares into a place

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Proto-Iranian *wardah
Old Persian *vr̥dah
Middle Persian gwl (gul)
Classical Persian گُل (gul)
Proto-Indo-European *h₂ep-der.
Proto-Indo-Iranian *Hā́ps
Proto-Iranian *Hā́fš
Old Persian 𐎠𐎱𐎡𐎹𐎠 (a-p-i-y-a)
Middle Persian ʾp̄
Classical Persian آب (āb)
Classical Persian گُلَاب (gulāb)bor.
Arabic جلاب
Borrowed from Classical Persian گُلَاب (gulāb, “rosewater”).
